prompt: Full-body portrait of a stylish young Japanese anime woman standing in a clean fashion studio against a plain light gray-white background. She has a slim attractive figure, pale skin, short chin-length bob hair in white with subtle green-tinted shadows, soft green eyes, and a calm slightly aloof expression, looking slightly to the viewer’s right. Outfit: a black sheer asymmetric one-shoulder crop top with a high neck and thin strap details, layered necklaces/choker, an oversized emerald green bomber jacket worn off the shoulders with bulky sleeves, a high-waisted white mini skirt with black sheer side panels, a wide black belt with a large silver rectangular buckle, two visible garter straps connected to thigh-high sheer dark stockings, and chunky black platform ankle boots with buckle straps. Pose: relaxed upright standing pose, legs close together, one shoulder exposed, arms hanging naturally inside the loose jacket sleeves. Lighting and rendering: highly detailed polished anime illustration, sharp focus, soft studio lighting from the upper right, strong realistic cast shadow falling to the left on the wall and floor, subtle fabric transparency and folds, clean composition, no text, no props, no watermark.
